name: Artichoke Flatbread with Crumbled Seitan

ingredients.item: raw cashews, soaked from 1 hour to overnight and drained

method: Add all of the cheese ingredients to a blender and blend until smooth. Turn this blended mixture into a saucepan. Cook over medium heat and stir until the sauce thickens a bit. It will take 5 to 10 minutes. Take off the heat to cool.
Spread a ½-cup layer of cashew cheese on each flatbread. Sprinkle half of the spinach on each flatbread. Divide the seitan, artichokes, tomatoes, and olives and sprinkle evenly over each flatbread.
Serve with hempseed to sprinkle over top.
